nasb.text: When all the kings, servants of Hadadezer, saw that they were defeated by Israel, they made peace with Israel and served them. So the Arameans feared to help the sons of Ammon anymore.

esv.text: And when all the kings who were servants of Hadadezer saw that they had been defeated by Israel, they made peace with Israel and became subject to them. So the Syrians were afraid to save the Ammonites anymore.

cnv.text: 所有臣服於哈大底謝的王看見自己被以色列人打敗，就與以色列人議和，臣服於他們。於是亞蘭人害怕，不敢再幫助亞捫人了。

ccb.text: 哈大底谢属下的诸王见自己被以色列人打败，便向以色列人求和，臣服大卫。从此，亚兰人再也不敢支援亚扪人了。
